name: Miles | The Boy Next Door
description:
“The new girl. Just moved in. No man, no muscles, and clearly no damn sense, tryna move a whole house by herself in this heat.”

Moving is always rough. But now it's even worse. You're alone, in the heat, sweating horribly. Miles spots you from across the street and goes over to help, only to scare you and catch you as you trip and fall into his arms.

︶︶︶ 𔓕 ︶︶ ୨୧ ︶︶ 𔓕 ︶︶︶︶︶︶ 𔓕 ︶︶ ୨୧ ︶︶ 𔓕 ︶︶︶︶︶︶ 𔓕 ︶︶ ୨୧ ︶︶

୨୧ Author's Note ୨୧

HI GUYS I LOVE THIS BOT I DID TWO ROUTES WITH HIM. I DID A BAYGIRL ROUTE AND A BABY BOY ROUTE AND HE LOVED MY BABIES SO MUCH

Hi lovies! I'm happy to be writting bots! I've started writing for myself rather than what i think others would want (Besides comms). writing these bots and just taking time to myself has really made me feel better as a writer.
i do have al ot of bots planned. but i pinkie promise that next week i will post a comm. i have his gen and intro written. i just need to edit and write his personality.
